Uses of Package
org.moeaframework.util.statistics

Packages that use org.moeaframework.util.statistics
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.util.statistics
Collection of statistical methods for determining certain properties of collected samples.
  • Classes in org.moeaframework.util.statistics used by org.moeaframework.util.statistics
    Class
    Description
    IntervalRatioStatisticalTest
    Abstract class for interval ratio statistical tests.
    Observation
    Stores an observed value and the group from which the observation belongs.
    OrdinalStatisticalTest
    Abstract class for implementing ordinal (rank-based) statistical tests.
    RankedObservation
    An observation with a rank.
    StatisticalTest
    Interface for statistical hypothesis testing methods.
